description_long: This is a modern, full-size pickup truck with a four-door crew cab configuration and a spacious rear cargo bed. The exterior features a robust front grille, contoured hood, and prominent wheel arches, giving it a rugged yet refined appearance. The wheels are large and fitted with all-terrain tires, suitable for both urban and off-road environments. The rear cargo bed is open and equipped with a tailgate, making it ideal for transporting goods or equipment. The body is primarily finished in a combination of gray and black, with subtle detailing and visible badging on the rear quarter panel. The windows are tinted, and the side mirrors are integrated into the doors, reflecting a contemporary design.
description: A four-door, full-size pickup truck with a gray and black exterior, large wheels, and an open rear cargo bed. It features a robust, modern design suitable for urban and utility use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grille, headlights, and contoured hood, emphasizing the truck's width and robust stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four-door cab, large wheels, and the extended cargo bed at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open cargo bed, tailgate, and rear lights, with visible bed rails and detailing.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the crew cab, wheels, and cargo bed, with visible badging on the rear quarter.
